# Training Transcript — Item Management: Creating Food and Non-Food Items

**Date:** May 15, 2026
**Presenter:** Sarah Chen (Implementation Specialist)
**Attendees:** Brunswick County Schools onboardi

p.text:
Now I have the full transcript. Let me identify the distinct features and begin matching them all to Jira tickets in parallel.

**Features identified from transcript:**
1. Creating Non-Food Items (Item card + Units/pack sizes)
2. Creating Food Items (full workflow)
3. Item card fields (Description, Category, Storage, Valuation Group, Tags, Brand, Manufacturer)
4. Pack size configuration (Higher/Lower tiers, 3-tier max, BU badge)
5. Missing Costing alert & automatic cost calculation
6. GTIN/UPC b
